## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes (fmt, vet, lint, race tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (wire-shape test for any payload change)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `doc.go` / `CHANGELOG.md`) if the public API changed
- [ ] No new third-party dependency added to the core
